title: QuickEquip
description: Automatically equips the best replacement tool when one breaks — ranked by tier, durability, and enchantments.
body:
## 🛠️ QuickEquip

> **Never stop mining again.**
> When your pickaxe breaks, QuickEquip instantly finds the best replacement from your inventory — **no clicks, no delays.**

---

### 🧩 What It Does

QuickEquip is a small Minecraft Forge mod that helps you keep moving. When one of your tools breaks (like a pickaxe or axe), this mod automatically finds a similar tool in your inventory and puts it in your hand.

It chooses the **best** tool based on:

* 🔼 **Tool Tier** (Netherite > Diamond > Iron > Stone > Wood)
* 💎 **Enchantments** (like Efficiency or Unbreaking)
* 💚 **Durability Left**

You don’t have to pause or open your inventory. It just works.

---

### 🎮 How to Use

* ✅ Install the mod like any other Forge mod
* 🧱 Put backup tools of the **same type** in your inventory
* 🔨 Break your current tool... and watch it get auto-replaced!
* 🔁 Press **R** to toggle the feature ON or OFF anytime

> You’ll see a clear message:
> 🟢 “Auto-equip enabled”
> 🔴 “Auto-equip disabled”

---

### ⚙️ Compatibility

* ✅ Works on **Minecraft Forge 1.20.1**
* ✅ Safe to add or remove anytime
* 🚫 Doesn’t affect servers unless installed client-side

---

### 📦 Perfect For

* Builders who hate stopping
* Miners who carry extra tools
* Players who love smooth gameplay
* Modpacks that want more QoL features

**Note**: The 1.21.x version of this datapack is currently in beta and only supports core features. More features will be added in future updates. Showcased media includes the Advanced Tool Stats Datapack.
